retry_reason: Operation is unconditional and always succeeds; retrying would cause double unregister/free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the MDIO bus associated with the arc EMAC private structure. It calls mdiobus_unregister to disable the bus, then mdiobus_free to decrement the reference count and free the bus if the count reaches zero. Finally, it sets priv->bus to NULL to prevent use-after-free. The caller must ensure that priv->bus is valid (non-NULL) before calling this function, and must not access the bus afterward. This function does not return any error indication; it always succeeds if called correctly.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release the MDIO bus via unregister and free (put) calls, with only a null assignment afterward. No other business logic.
